static_decisions.headline: Equipment Maintenance Overdue at HSR Layout
static_decisions.evidence: 3 treadmills reported faulty in the last 48 hours. Maintenance contract SLA breached by 12 hours.
static_decisions.recommended_action: Escalate to Facility Manager immediately and offer members 1-day guest passes to nearby branches.
static_decisions.sample_whatsapp_message: Hi Facility Team, HSR Layout treadmills are down. SLA breached. Need immediate dispatch.

static_decisions.headline: Upsell Opportunity for Personal Training at JP Nagar
static_decisions.evidence: 15 members recently hit their 100th check-in milestone but haven't purchased PT packages.
static_decisions.recommended_action: Send automated WhatsApp message offering 15% off first PT package to these members.
static_decisions.sample_whatsapp_message: Congrats on 100 workouts! Celebrate with 15% off your first Personal Training package at JP Nagar.

static_decisions.headline: Mutton biryani members show 2.3x higher retention
static_decisions.evidence: Members who regularly order mutton biryani at post-workout meal add-ons show significantly higher 90-day retention than average.
static_decisions.recommended_action: Feature mutton biryani in this week's WhatsApp status update to at-risk segments.
